fast.description: Auto model selection; lets Copilot choose the fastest suitable available model.

balanced.description: Auto model selection; lets Copilot balance speed, cost, and capability.

best.description: Auto model selection; lets Copilot choose the best available model for the task.

bypass.description: Allows all tools, paths, and URLs, disables user prompts, and enables autonomous continuation.

workspace.description: Allows local read, write, and shell tools across the workspace without granting all URLs.
